description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a dark horizontal siding exterior and white trim around the windows and doors. The front facade features a prominent garage with a paneled white door, a main entry door, and several large rectangular windows, providing ample natural light. The house includes a sunroom or enclosed porch on one side, characterized by floor-to-ceiling windows. The roof is flat, and the overall structure is boxy with clean, straight lines, reflecting a contemporary architectural style. The window arrangement is mostly symmetrical, with some variation on the side and rear elevations. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms and open spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with dark horizontal siding, white trim, a flat roof, and large windows, including a sunroom and a prominent garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, garage, and several large windows with white trim.
description_view_1: Side view with fewer windows, highlighting the dark siding and a single window on the upper and lower levels.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring double glass doors, symmetrical window placement, and a clear view of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the sunroom with floor-to-ceiling windows and additional windows on the main structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with some asymmetrical placement and large sunroom windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple white door, no porch, adjacent to a large garage door, and minimal decorative elements.
